app.title: LLM Wiki
app.subtitle: Build and maintain your personal knowledge base with LLMs

sources.title: Raw Sources
sources.importHint: Import documents to start building your wiki
sources.delete: Delete source and related wiki pages
sources.deleteConfirm:
Delete "{{name}}" and its related wiki pages?

This will:
- Delete the source file
- Delete wiki pages generated from this source
- Update index.md

chat.ingestPlaceholder: Discuss the source or ask follow-up questions...
chat.emptyHint: Ask a question or start an ingest to begin.

settings.title: Settings
settings.customModel: Or type a custom model name
settings.customEndpointHint: Any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (e.g., LiteLLM, vLLM, LocalAI, Azure OpenAI)
settings.languageHint: Interface language (wiki content follows source material language)
settings.interfaceDescription: Display language for the application UI. Changes take effect immediately and are persisted.
settings.uiLanguageHint: Affects only UI labels and buttons, not AI output language (configure that under Output Preferences).
settings.outputDescription: Control the language and context length for AI-generated content.
settings.outputLanguageHint: Force AI-generated content (chat replies, wiki pages, research results, lint reports) to use the specified language. Choose "Auto" to follow the user's input or source document language.
settings.historyLengthHint: Number of past messages sent to the AI per request. More = richer context but higher token cost.
settings.embeddingDescription: Enables semantic search. Works with any OpenAI-compatible /v1/embeddings endpoint. No API key needed for local models (e.g. LM Studio, Ollama).
settings.embeddingEnableHint: When off, search uses token matching only.

preview.notAvailable: Preview not available for this file type
